inline_comments.0x87AD: Write dest network to TX FIFO
inline_comments.0x87B0: Install handler at &9E2B (write src addr for scout ACK)
inline_comments.0x87BF: Write our station to TX FIFO
inline_comments.0x87C4: Write network byte to TX FIFO
inline_comments.0x87CC: Bit 1 set: immediate op, use alt handler
inline_comments.0x87DC: Y = buffer offset, resume from last position
inline_comments.0x87ED: Write data byte to TX FIFO
inline_comments.0x87EF: Write first byte of pair to FIFO
inline_comments.0x87F7: No pages left: send last data
inline_comments.0x8807: No pages left: send last data
inline_comments.0x880B: BIT SR1: test IRQ (N=bit7) for tight loop
inline_comments.0x880E: IRQ still set: write 2 more bytes
inline_comments.0x8810: No IRQ: return, wait for next NMI
inline_comments.0x881B: Bit7 clear: error, install saved handler
inline_comments.0x8824: Load saved next handler low byte
inline_comments.0x8827: Load saved next handler high byte
inline_comments.0x882D: Tube TX: BIT SR1 test TDRA
inline_comments.0x8846: Counter wrapped to zero: last data
inline_comments.0x8848: Read second Tube byte from R3
inline_comments.0x884B: Write second byte to TX FIFO
inline_comments.0x885C: Counter wrapped to zero: last data
inline_comments.0x885E: BIT SR1: test IRQ for tight loop
inline_comments.0x8861: IRQ still set: write 2 more bytes
inline_comments.0x8863: No IRQ: return, wait for next NMI
inline_comments.0x8866: TX error: check flags for path
inline_comments.0x8869: Bit7 clear: TX result = not listening
inline_comments.0x886B: Bit7 set: discard and return to listen
inline_comments.0x886E: CR1=&82: TX_RESET | RIE (switch to RX for final ACK)
inline_comments.0x8884: Compare to our station (INTOFF side effect)
inline_comments.0x889A: BIT SR1: test IRQ -- more data ready?
inline_comments.0x889D: IRQ set -- fall through to &9F15 without RTI
inline_comments.0x88B7: Load TX flags for next action
inline_comments.0x88BF: A=&02: FV mask for SR2 bit1
inline_comments.0x88C1: BIT SR2: test FV -- frame must be complete
inline_comments.0x88CC: Y=0: index into TX control block
inline_comments.0x88D5: Full ADLC reset and return to idle listen
inline_comments.0x88FC: Load TX flags for transfer setup
inline_comments.0x890B: Y += 4: advance to high ptr offset
inline_comments.0x8915: Y -= 3: back to next low ptr byte
inline_comments.0x8922: Add RXCB base to get RXCB+4 addr
inline_comments.0x8925: Y = high byte of RXCB ptr
inline_comments.0x894C: Temp store of adjusted hi byte
inline_comments.0x8950: Copy RXCB[8] to open port buffer lo
inline_comments.0x895F: CR1=&C1: TX_RESET | RX_RESET | AC (both sections in reset, address control set)
inline_comments.0x8964: CR4=&1E (via AC=1): 8-bit RX word length, abort extend enabled, NRZ encoding
inline_comments.0x8969: CR3=&00 (via AC=1): no loop-back, no AEX, NRZ, no DTR
inline_comments.0x896E: CR1=&82: TX_RESET | RIE (TX in reset, RX interrupts enabled)
inline_comments.0x8978: Return; ADLC now in RX listen mode
inline_comments.0x8979: Check if Econet has been initialised
inline_comments.0x897C: Not initialised: skip to RX listen
inline_comments.0x897E: Read current NMI handler low byte
inline_comments.0x8985: Read current NMI handler high byte
inline_comments.0x899A: Set ADLC to RX listen mode
inline_comments.0x899D: INTOFF: disable NMIs while switching ROM
inline_comments.0x89A3: ROM bank 0 (patched during init for actual bank)
inline_comments.0x89A5: Select Econet ROM bank via ROMSEL
inline_comments.0x89A8: Jump to scout handler in ROM

line_comments.0x0625: BVS &05FC: overlapping code — loops back to
